description_long: This restaurant features a two-story structure with a beige stucco exterior and a prominent brown tiled gable roof. The front facade is adorned with a striped awning above the entrance, flanked by a wooden door and large windows, and includes a small balcony and signage in stylized script. The left side of the building displays climbing green vines, potted plants, and utility fixtures, adding a touch of greenery and urban character. The rear of the building is plain, with minimal detailing and a continuation of the tiled roof. The right side is similarly simple, with a visible downspout and a secondary door. The building sits on a textured stone pavement, suggesting its placement in a pedestrian-friendly urban environment.
description: A beige, two-story restaurant with a brown tiled roof, striped awning, and stylized signage, featuring greenery and urban details on the sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a striped awning, large windows, signage, a small balcony, and a vending machine or display case to the left.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights climbing vines, potted plants, utility fixtures, and a secondary entrance, giving a lively and urban feel.
description_view_2: The rear view is plain, dominated by the brown tiled roof and beige wall, with minimal architectural features and some greenery at the base.
description_view_3: The right side view is simple, showing the tiled roof, a downspout, and a secondary door, with little ornamentation.
attribute_signage: Stylized script signage above the entrance on the front facade, in a light color matching the building's palette.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features a beige stucco finish with a brown tiled gable roof and a striped yellow-and-white awning above the entrance. Decorative elements include a small balcony, stylized signage, and large front windows framed in wood. The overall style is warm and inviting, with subtle ornamentation and a harmonious color palette.
